text:
Kyun
Meri chandni mein phirta hai tu parishaan
Khamosh
Soorat-e-gul, manind-e-boo parishaan
Taaron
Ke motiyon ka shayad hai johri tu
Machli
Hai koi mere darya-e-noor ki tu
Ya
Tu meri jabeen ka taara gira hua hai
Riffat
Ko chhor kar jo basti mein ja basa hai
Khamosh
Ho gaya hai taar-e-rabab-e-hasti
Hai
Mere aainay mein tasveer-e-khwaab-e-hasti
Darya
Ki teh mein chashm-e-gardaab so gayi hai
Sahil
Se lag ke mauj-e-betaab so gayi hai
Basti
Zameen ki kaisi hungama-afreen hai
Yoon
So gayi hai jaise aabaad hi nahin hai
Shayar
Ka dil hai lekin na-ashna sukoon se
Azaad
Reh gaya tu kyonkar mere fusoon se?
